name: Blumgi Soccer
author: Poki
description: Blumgi Soccer is an soccer game that challenges your aiming and shooting skills across various worlds! The task is simple - shoot the soccer ball into the goal! Hold down the action button, adjust your angle to aim at the goal, and release the button to unleash your shot! But beware, different types of obstacles stand in your way to stop you from scoring! So pay attention to the obstacles and the number of balls remaining for you to shoot. Can you conquer each world with your flawless shooting precision? How to play Blumgi Soccer? Click and hold to aim. Release to shoot the ball. Who created Blumgi Soccer? Blumgi Soccer is created by Blumgi. Play their other fun arcade games on Poki: Blumgi Rocket , Blumgi Slime , Blumgi Bloom , Blumgi Ball , Blumgi Castle , Blumgi Dragon , and Swingo ! How can I play Blumgi Soccer for free? You can play Blumgi Soccer for free on Poki. Can I play Blumgi Soccer on mobile devices and desktop? Blumgi Soccer can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
